title: PacBio Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
text: PacBio reported Q1 2026 revenue of $37.2 million with consumables of $21.8 million and instrument revenue of $9.7 million. GAAP gross profit was $12.8 million with GAAP net loss of $8.3 million. Revenue missed estimates with $37.18 million vs analyst estimates of $40 million representing a 7.1% miss. Adjusted EPS of -$0.12 beat analyst estimates of -$0.14 representing an 8.7% beat. Consumable revenue climbed to a record $21.8 million in Q1 2026, up 9% from $20.1 million a year earlier. However, total revenue held steady at $37.2 million in Q1 2026, unchanged from prior year. Instrument revenue fell 12% year-over-year to $9.7 million from $11.0 million, reflecting softer demand and pricing. PacBio lowered the high end of its 2026 revenue outlook by $5 million and now expects revenue in the range of $165 million to $175 million. The company expects non-GAAP gross margins to improve to 41% to 44%, up from 40% in 2025, driven by the SPRQ-Nx launch and favorable product mix shifts toward higher-margin consumables.
